notes: Queen of the Lombards, noted for her Catholic faith and diplomatic relations with Pope Gregory the Great.

docs.title: Letter 5
docs.author: Pope Gregory the Great
docs.subject_summary: Gregory sends copies of his Dialogues to Theudelinda
docs.excerpt: The steady example of a Catholic queen who governs well, treats people justly, and holds to her faith without either hiding it or making it a weapon — this is the most powerful argument for Christianity that the Lombards will ever encounter.
